title: Scientific Advisory Committee on Cardiovascular Devices - November 25, 2016 Agenda - Canada.ca
content:
## Scientific Advisory Committee on Cardiovascular Devices - November 25, 2016 Agenda
Place: 1600 Scott Street, Holland Cross, Tower B, Room 5118 Date and time: November 25, 2016, 7:30 am to 4:00 pm
Chairperson: Dr. John Ducas Science Advisor: Hripsime Shahbazian Scientific & Regulatory Officer: Larissa Lefebvre Participants: SAC MDUCS Members,   Guest Speakers, Health Canada
Review of the Agenda, Declaration of Affiliations and Interests Kimby Barton, (DGO, TPD) & Dr. John Ducas (SAC-MDUCS Chair)
Review of Terms of Reference, Membership and members’ Affiliations and Interests Mrs. Hripsime Shahbazian (Office of Science, TPD)
Summary of how information from previous meeting is being used Mr. Kevin Day (Medical Devices Bureau, TPD)
Question 1: Various Techniques to improve CRT responder rates Presenter: Dr. Raymond Yee
Question 2: Transcatheter Aortic Valve Replacement (TAVR) Presenter: Dr. Marino Labinaz
Question 3: Transcatheter Mitral Valve Replacement (TMVR) Presenter: Dr. Mark Peterson
Question 4a: Drug coated balloons (cardiac) Presenter: Dr. John Ducas
Question 4b: Drug coated balloons (vascular) Speaker: Dr. Kong Teng Tan
Question 5: Pediatric Devices Presenter: Dr. Joaquim Miro
Next Steps, Closing Remarks and Adjournment of Meeting Committee Chair: Dr. John Ducas
